do_not_claim_now: closed scalar cocycle primitive on the live refinement family
notes: This artifact is a conditional reduction of the future single slot, not a proof that the slot is already filled.
The cocycle language is used only after centered promotion identifies the non-scalar part across refinements.
Measured charged masses remain outside the defining data of this reduction.
role: Reduce the post-promotion charged absolute-side blocker to its exact scalar content: after centered promotion, the only remaining degree of freedom in an uncentered trace lift is the affine scalar identity mode.

scalar_cocycle_contract.ambient_identification: after theorem-grade centered identification of the promoted charged response across the live refinement family
do_not_use: extra matrix-valued refinement data beyond scalar identity mode
scalar_cocycle_contract.primitive_required_on_fill: exists mu(r) with delta(r,r') = mu(r') - mu(r)

theorem_statement: Assuming theorem-grade promotion of C_hat_e on theorem-grade physical Y_e, the post-promotion charged absolute-side blocker is not an additional matrix-valued refinement theorem. Any admissible uncentered lift differs from the centered operator only by a scalar multiple of the identity, and the pairwise refinement differences of that scalar form an additive cocycle. Trivializing that cocycle by a primitive mu is equivalent to giving the uncentered trace lift, the determinant-line section, and the affine anchor A_ch.

mandatory_package_a.current_strength_statement: neither exact vanishing nor uniform quadratic smallness is proved on the live corpus
mandatory_package_a.immediate_downstream_effect: No theorem-grade C_hat_e follows from the displayed current-corpus transfer data alone, so the live open charged issues begin at the post-promotion lift and affine-anchor chain rather than at the exact obstruction certificate.
mandatory_package_a.reopen_condition: a stronger transfer theorem beyond the displayed current-corpus projector and commutator data
mandatory_package_a.summary: The current corpus emits an exact obstruction certificate against promoting the latent charged operator candidate C_hat_e^{cand} from the displayed projector and proxy-generator data alone.

mandatory_package_b.immediate_downstream_effect: The determinant-line section and A_ch are then induced canonically by A_ch = (1/3) log det(Y_e) = (1/3) tr(log Y_e).
mandatory_package_b.summary: Derive the refinement-stable uncentered trace lift of the promoted charged response on theorem-grade physical Y_e or an equivalent determinant line.

mandatory_package_c.immediate_downstream_effect: Once A_ch exists, the absolute charged scale is emitted by g_e = exp(A_ch), and Delta_e_abs follows as log(g_ch_shared) - A_ch.
mandatory_package_c.summary: Read out the affine charged absolute coordinate A_ch from the induced determinant-line section, with A_ch(logm + c*(1,1,1)) = A_ch(logm) + c.

optional_package_d.summary: Retain a charged holonomy bridge only if the older delta = 2/9 D12 benchmark is kept as a theorem-grade bridge instead of a diagnostic continuation.

why_this_is_sharp: It keeps the existing single-slot frontier intact: the missing object remains the refinement-stable uncentered trace lift.
It removes a weaker reading in which an extra matrix theorem or separate determinant trivialization would still be needed after centered promotion.
It identifies the exact post-promotion burden as one scalar cocycle primitive on the refinement family.
Once refinement stability on theorem-grade physical Y_e is imposed, even that primitive descends further to one physical affine scalar.
